## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX Labs to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant SEO progress: 79 clicks (60 in last week) from 9.13k impressions; crypto article unexpectedly driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [New product features: Private meeting transcription and Chrome extension for lightweight use, private browsing history](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: Moving towards bottom-of-funnel content specific to Knapsack, while maintaining top-of-funnel momentum](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Dramatic increase: 60 clicks in last week (15x growth) with 105% impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - Crypto article ("AI predicting crypto market trends") driving 30 clicks, ranking \#2 for long-tail query
  - [New articles quickly gaining traction (e.g., "How to create an AI using Macbook" with 3 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Consistent daily impressions around 400, indicating exponential growth](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Domain Authority increased from \~40 to 130 in a week (though accuracy questioned)](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Implemented backlinks from every.io, resolvepay.com, and web stacks](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Impact on Domain Authority expected in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Suggestion to incorporate outbound link building in future outreach campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Shift focus to bottom-of-funnel content specific to Knapsack](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [New topics: Knapsack bridging AI gap, private automation, healthcare/finance use cases](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Maintain some top/middle-of-funnel content to keep momentum](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [150 out of \~160 articles indexed, indicating good quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### New Product Features

  - [Private meeting transcription: Local device recording and processing for enhanced privacy](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Chrome extension: Lightweight alternative to full app download](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Private browser history recording: Allows users to query past browsing privately](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### RB2B and Outbound Strategy

  - [RB2B captures \~4% of leads, skewed towards professionals with LinkedIn profiles](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Recommendation to pair RB2B with GetKoala for intent flaring and increased enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Outbound setup: 10 domains, 20 email accounts, 30-35 emails per day per account (600-700 total daily)](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop content around new features: private meeting transcription and Chrome extension](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Create bottom-of-funnel articles specific to Knapsack (e.g., bridging AI gap, use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of competitor comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Ensure content team has access to Knapsack app for accurate feature descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Implement and track impact of backlink strategy on Domain Authority](https://fathom.video/share/393euzun3Zcsk_VKzQK49Y7V2iFML1vP?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
